geography.data_source: GHMC ward map 2020, Kondapur-Gachibowli zone boundary, new development area shapefiles

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Rangareddy district tables, rapid growth estimated at 6.0% CAGR post-2014 near HiTech City

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Telangana urban tables, salary surveys for Kondapur-Gachibowli area, proximity to HiTech City employment effect

commute_profile.data_source: HMR Blue Line data 2023, short commute due to proximity to HiTech City, high car ownership in new gated communities

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from emerging high-income professional zone, low fare sensitivity, high digital diffusion, examination concerns for children, Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from new gated community patterns, professional networking, lower neighbourhood bond strength in new developments

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from Kondapur junction commercial activity, new retail development
Estimated from Gachibowli road restaurant and retail strip serving IT worker population

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted High Income/Professional template for Kondapur's emerging character — reduced tech_knowledge_worker from 0.38 to 0.34 (less concentrated than pure IT corridor), increased homemaker and gig for residential service demand

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from new development governance, strong RWA presence in gated communities, international school concentration
